head.title: Start a conversation
head.subTitle: Tell us about your organisation and what you want to build. We reply within two business days with next steps—often a short discovery call.

projectGoal.label: What are you trying to build?
projectGoal.placeholder: e.g. customer portal, internal ops tool, integration between X and Y…

timeline.label: Target timeline
timeline.placeholder: e.g. MVP in Q3, launch before year-end…

budgetBand.label: Budget range (optional)
budgetBand.placeholder: e.g. under $10k, $10k–50k, $50k+ (helps us suggest the right engagement)

message.label: Anything else we should know?
message.placeholder: Constraints, existing systems, team skills, links…
